title: verbena pilosiuscula
intro: Verbena pilosiuscula, also known as Brazilian verbena, is a plant species belonging to the Verbenaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, antispasmodic, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Verbena pilosiuscula include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation, and treating digestive issues such as irritable bowel syndrome (IBS) and stomach ulcers. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal and health benefits.
